home.eyebrow: Practical legal development for the SQE, QWE and AI era
home.title: Legal Development Starts Here.
home.intro: LawBridge helps aspiring lawyers build practical legal capability through structured learning, real-world exercises, mentor guidance, workshops, webinars and commercial awareness training.

curriculum_preview.title: Develop the skills legal education alone cannot fully provide.
curriculum_preview.intro: The LawBridge curriculum is built around practical skills aspiring lawyers need to become more commercially aware, confident and practice-ready.

problem_section.title: Legal education is changing. The skills gap is growing.
problem_section.intro: Aspiring lawyers are entering a profession shaped by the SQE, QWE flexibility, commercial pressure and rapid advances in AI. Many students still need practical exposure to how legal work is delivered.
